nodes.name: Torrent-lark
nodes.summary: The torrent-lark (Grallina bruijnii) is a species of bird in the family Monarchidae found on New Guinea. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. Though most Monarchidae birds make their nests out of plant materials, the torrent-lark makes its nest out of mud. References
